label: Cthulhu Spider Guard
author: sirkitree
description:
There are tales of an island far out to sea, where Cthulhu builds an army to corrupt and enslave the inhabitants of the mainland. The Spider Guard is one such amalgamation in his arsenal of deadly constructs.
